name: Harley Quinn - Gloomy Gotham Night
description:
“Gee, boss, you really know how to put the fun in funeral.”

Requested by: no one

POV: anypov

Scenario: you run into the Harley Quinn while on a heist!

Yeah so i've been looking for a while for a Harley bot that doesn't immediately pounce on you, couldn't find one, so i said i'd try to do one myself. Let me know if i got it right!

this is my fiftteenth bot. If you got any questions or tips on how to improve this bot, don't hesitate to comment them in a respectful manner.

tags: Harley Quinn, Harleen Quinzel, jester, dc comics

Comments are appreciated!

Have fun!
